title: Multi Select All Sub Items

posts.author: mackdodge (Mack Dodge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please, add a “select all sub items” button.

When you filter a board by an asset in multiple groups you should be able to click a select all sub items button to select all the items in each group instead of having to click each one individually.

What are you trying to achieve

This will allow users to quickly batch select entire assets across multiple groups in order to process batch changes in columns.

For example if I have Hindi on 8 episodes across 7 seasons and I need to change each one’s status to “live” I currently have to manually select each item, which means expanding all sub items and clicking each one for a total of 56 times.

It would be nice if I could filter by Hindi and select all sub items, reducing this to one click.
